approved_command_preview: Patch PR #271 changed-file manifest dependency expansion so collector_wrapper_source and collector_part_files are validated as repo-relative, non-traversing, non-drive-qualified, repo-root-contained paths before they are returned to collect_surfaces. The command guards the current PR branch head be07c9c0af86790fe44241fc8a407c0f5631c224 and current source/test blobs, patches only build_powershell_surface_inventory.py and the focused path-safety regression test, runs py_compile, the path-safety unittest, git diff checks, commits to codex/issue-267-powershell-engine-pester-boundary, pushes with a bridged token, writes a durable summary, and polls for workflow runs. The PR remains Draft and no external review request is posted.
